history.content: Take a desktop screenshot so you can see what's currently on my screen. Then identify which app window is active, find the Notepad application (launch it if it's not open), focus it, click in the text area, and type the text "Prometheus desktop control test — [timestamp]". Then press Enter, take another screenshot to confirm the text is there, and finally send that screenshot to me via Telegram with the caption "✅ Desktop control test complete".

Done — I completed the desktop control test: focused Notepad, typed `Prometheus desktop control test — 2026-03-14 11:03 PM`, pressed Enter, and sent the screenshot to Telegram with the caption:

✅ **Desktop control test complete**
